subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! Blessed art thou for having been steadfast and firm, for having grown and turned thyself unto Him, and for having taken refuge in His shelter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله طوبی لک بما استقمت و ثبت و نبت و توجهت و آویت الی رکن
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
